1.name: Accurate
1.rules: Gain +2 to attack rolls made with this arrow

1.name: Explosive
1.rules: On impact, this arrow explodes and deals 2 fire damage to each creature within 5 ft.

1.name: Flaming
1.rules: All damage from this arrow is fire damage and ignites flammable objects.

1.name: Healing
1.rules: Instead of dealing damage to allies with this arrow, they heal 1d4 hitpoints instead.

1.name: Radiant
1.rules: All attacks with this arrow deal radiant damage instead.

1.name: Boundy
1.rules: This arrow can bounce off of one surface before it hits its first target.

1.name: Roped
1.rules: After dealing damage to a target, if the target is small or medium, you can either pull yourself to the target or make a strength contest to pull the target 10 ft towards you.

1.name: Glowing
1.rules: The arrow gains all benefits from the Light spell and leaves a glowing trail in it's path.

1.name: Immaterial
1.rules: You can shoot this arrow through solid objects.

1.name: Floating
1.rules: Gravity does not affect this arrow.

1.name: Foggy
1.rules: Bursts into a cloud of mist on impact. Grants partial cover.

1.name: Tongued
1.rules: You can dictate a short sentence to the arrow which it recites on impact.

1.name: Second Chance
1.rules: You can remove one feature from this arrow and regain the crafting points. Including this one.

1.name: True
1.rules: Can hit invisible targets if you describe the target to the arrow.

1.name: Colorful
1.rules: Choose a color. On impact this arrow bursts, covering the area in hard to remove coloring.

1.name: Listening
1.rules: For the next minute after firing, you can listen as if you were in the space of the arrow

1.name: Scrying
1.rules: For the next minute after firing you can see as if you were in the space of the arrow

1.name: Invisible
1.rules: Really hard to find, but you gain advantage on attacks made with this arrow.

1.name: Bursting
1.rules: This arrow brusts into many pieces on impact and the splinters deal 1 damage to each creature within 30 ft.

2.name: Toppling
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength save or be knocked Prone.

2.name: Splitting
2.rules: You can target an additional creature with this attack.

2.name: Massive
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength save or be pushed 10 feet away from you.

2.name: Quick-Draw
2.rules: If you miss with this arrow, you can use a Bonus Action to immediately fire one non-magical arrow.

2.name: Hamstring
2.rules: The target cannot take the Dash or Disengage action until the end of its next turn.

2.name: Distracting
2.rules: The next attack roll made against this target by someone other than you has Advantage.

2.name: Loud
2.rules: Emits a loud noise while flying. Creatures in its path are deafened until the start of your next turn.

2.name: Tasty
2.rules: This arrow becomes edible and can feed a group of adventureres for a day.

2.name: Invisiblerer
2.rules: Allies affected or hit by this arrow turn invisible for 1 minute, or until they attack or cast a spell.

2.name: Giant
2.rules: Allies affected or hit by this arrow gain the benefit of the Enlarge spell for 1 minute

2.name: Chaining
2.rules: After the arrow hits, choose another target and repeat the attack. Continue until you miss. And yes, all secondary effects still happen for all attacks.

3.name: Fire
3.rules: The arrow deals an extra 2d8 Fire damage and ignites flammable objects not being worn.

3.name: Frost
3.rules: If you damage an enemy, it's speed is halved until the end of its next turn. It cannot take Reactions.

3.name: Cleaving
3.rules: Attack each creature in a 15 ft cone

3.name: Draining
3.rules: The arrow deals an extra 1d4 Necrotic damage; you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt.

3.name: Blinding
3.rules: If the attack hits, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution save or be Blinded until the end of its next turn.

3.name: Charming
3.rules: You can choose to charm a creature instead of dealing damage with this.
